name: onboarding_resume_mid_field_collection
notes: Interruption DURING the initial ACTIVE field-collection walk (distinct from onboarding_resume_after_interruption_deferred.json, which resumes the COMPLETE journey's post-profile paced flow). The owner supplies facts, breaks off mid-conversation, then returns — the onboarding_journey row (queue/cursor/answers) is the durable resumability substrate and must not be re-walked from question 1. Setup: `setup --owner-inputs true --journey` (ACTIVE journey, 2-entry queue: confirm business_type='sweets' + gap 'about') then `script <tenant> onboarding_resume_mid_field_collection.json`.

steps.message: haan sahi hai, hum Probe Namkeen hain, Nagpur mein snacks ki dukaan hai
steps.note: Confirms the business_type guess AND volunteers the business name + city in the same message.

steps.message: ek second, mujhe kahin jaana hai abhi, thodi der baad baat karta hoon
steps.note: Owner breaks off mid-journey. Expect a graceful, low-pressure acknowledgement — no forced question, no repeat of the just-answered confirm.

steps.message: ok wapas aa gaya, chalo aage badhte hain
assert_not_contains: which city is your business in
steps.note: Owner returns. The journey must resume from the cursor it was at — NOT re-ask the business_type confirm or the name/city already given before the interruption.
